{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/16935049?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/ssst0n3", "id": 16935049, "login": "ssst0n3", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2OTM1MDQ5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/ssst0n3", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46680", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:L/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-843", "name": "Access of Resource Using Incompatible Type ('Type Confusion')"}], "description": "### Impact
A bug was found in containerd where containers launched with a numeric `User` directive that cannot be parsed as a 32-bit integer are incorrectly treated as a username. If a crafted image provides an `/etc/passwd` file mapping this large numeric string to root, the container ultimately runs as root (UID 0). This allows the Kubernetes `runAsNonRoot` restriction to be bypassed, causing unexpected behavior for environments that require containers to run as a non-root user.

### Patches
This bug has been fixed in the following containerd versions:

* 2.3.1
* 2.2.4
* 2.0.9
* 1.7.32

Note: The containerd 2.1 release has reached its [end of life](https://containerd.io/releases/#current-state-of-containerd-releases) and a fixed version is not provided.

Users should update to these versions to resolve the issue.

### Workarounds
Ensure that only trusted images are used and that only trusted users have permissions to import images. Alternatively, enforcing a specific numeric `runAsUser` in the Kubernetes Pod `securityContext` overrides the `USER` directive in the image and prevents the bypass. Newer versions of Kubernetes, starting with 1.34, also appear to enforce `runAsNonRoot` properly regardless of this bug.

### Credits
The containerd project would like to thank Lei Wang (@ssst0n3) for responsibly disclosing this issue in accordance with the [containerd security policy](https://github.com/containerd/project/blob/main/SECURITY.md).

### Resources
* https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-265r-hfxg-fhmg (CVE-2024-40635)

### For more information

If there are any questions or comments about this advisory:

* Open an issue in [containerd](https://github.com/containerd/containerd/issues/new/choose)
* Send an email to [security@containerd.io](mailto:security@containerd.io)

To report a security issue in containerd:
* [Report a new vulnerability](https://github.com/containerd/containerd/security/advisories/new)
* Send an email to [security@containerd.io](mailto:security@containerd.io)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00221, "percentile": 0.12579}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:40:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46680"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:40:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/containerd/containerd/security/advisories/GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/containerd/containerd/security-advisories/GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/containerd/containerd", "summary": "containerd user ID handling bypass allows runAsNonRoot evasion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-21T21:40:36Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fqw6-gf59-qr4w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.7.32", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containerd/containerd"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.7.27, < 1.7.32"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.0.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containerd/containerd/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.0.4, < 2.0.9"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.2.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containerd/containerd/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.1.0-beta.0, < 2.2.4"}, {"first_patched_version": "2.3.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/containerd/containerd/v2"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.3.0-beta.0, < 2.3.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: containerd user ID handling bypass allows runAsNonRoot evasion
